text.title: ES Snapshots Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to introduce snapshots for an existing ES aggregate.

step.name: benchmark-replay
step.action: Measure cold-load latency at p50/p99. If < 100ms and stream length < 200 events, skip snapshots. Otherwise proceed.
step.decision-gate: If load is fast enough, STOP — snapshots are not needed.

step.name: pick-interval
step.action: Pick N ∈ [50, 100]. Smaller N for high-write/short-tail aggregates; larger N for long-lived aggregates with bursty access patterns.

step.name: snapshot-storage
step.action: Create snapshot table `(stream_id, snapshot_version, schema_version, payload, created_at)`. Index on (stream_id, snapshot_version DESC).

step.name: loader-and-writer
step.action: Loader: read latest snapshot for stream; if schema_version matches current, deserialize + replay events > snapshot_version; if not, fall back to replay-from-zero. Writer: after every N events, persist snapshot.

step.name: invalidation-script
step.action: Implement `invalidate <Aggregate>` CLI that DELETES from snapshot table where aggregate_type=<X>. Add CI step that runs invalidate before deploying a new schema version.
step.decision-gate: If CI cannot run invalidate before deploy, FAIL the release.
